location: Found inside a chest atop a watchtower in Castle Ensis, reached early via a route from the Castle Front site of grace - across the bridge, up stairs past a giant and dog-handler soldiers, then up a ladder to the tower's top.
tactics: From Castle Front, cross the bridge into the castle - a giant guards the entrance and can be fought or run past.
Head north up the only stairway, clearing (or avoiding) two soldiers with attack dogs, then look southwest for a ladder leading up the tower.
The chest sits at the top with no guardians directly on it.

This is one of the first pickups available in Castle Ensis, well before reaching Rellana's boss arena deeper in the castle - don't mistake it for the exclusive Wing Stance skill book, which is found elsewhere in the same dungeon.
lore: Milady is a full greatsword-length blade deliberately forged light, earning its name as a nod to the elegant noblewomen who could wield it. Its reduced weight lets a skilled user swing it with something close to straight-sword speed despite the long blade.

builds.name: Quality Str/Dex
builds.why: Both scaling stats sit at D, so a balanced Strength/Dexterity quality build extracts even value from the weapon without overinvesting in either stat.

builds.name: Status infusion greatsword
builds.why: Milady is the only Light Greatsword that accepts Ashes of War and affinities, so it's the go-to pick for Blood, Frost, or other status infusions on this weapon class, backed by its exclusive Wing Stance skill.
